precondition: Debug Panel is opened after packaged or dev app startup before any new session event occurs
expected_behavior: Session Timeline / 本局时间线 is visible as a lightweight folded Debug Panel section and shows 本局还没有记录到关键变化 when opened.

precondition: A safe game_context_changed event is emitted after the initial startup baseline
expected_behavior: Timeline adds a short item such as 切换游戏：Elden Ring without recording raw user text.

precondition: Game session debug data changes boss, death count, frustration count, or cleared boss after user activity
expected_behavior: Timeline adds safe items for detected boss, death count, frustration state, and boss cleared using short summaries only.

precondition: Knowledge retrieval is used for a supported game during a chat turn
expected_behavior: Timeline adds 使用知识 with a safe game/topic title and does not show snippet preview, knowledge file path, prompt, or raw JSON.

precondition: A proactive companion message is shown
expected_behavior: Timeline adds 主动陪伴已显示 with a safe trigger label and does not show the full proactive or assistant text.

precondition: The user accepts or ignores a pending memory
expected_behavior: Timeline adds 记忆已接受 or 记忆已忽略 without showing memory text, evidence, or raw memory payload.

precondition: Timeline has at least one item and the user clicks 清空时间线
expected_behavior: Timeline clears the in-memory current-session items and returns to the empty state without clearing Event Stream, chat, memory, or game session state.

precondition: More than the timeline limit of safe events is emitted and some source summaries contain sensitive-looking text
expected_behavior: Timeline keeps only the latest bounded list of items, truncates long summaries, and redacts paths, API keys, raw prompt markers, transcripts, stdout, and stderr.

precondition: Packaged app is opened for manual smoke after Game Session Timeline work
expected_behavior: Packaged app is not black, Settings and Overlay safe mode remain usable, Debug Panel shows Session Timeline / 本局时间线, and the timeline can add and clear safe items without affecting Voice, Local ASR, Event Stream, or Overlay safe mode.
